textByHash.0593029ee938d9f3bc673f3615a294cd9d7d128a: Who can tell? It's one of the drawbacks to living in a swamp. You get used to it after a while.
textByHash.0650b0dae60d38b5c6a88fc36f6d9bb549b5ca68: There is a certain lady I am trying to impress. As a man of noble birth, I can not give her just any old trinket to show my devotion. What I intend to give her,
textByHash.0e6b7fb4285200a54a3ca925d33df50bbd75610a: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having.
textByHash.0edab1059cb8abc9d15960baa6449352bb154fb1: If you're into Mining, plenty! The dwarves have one of the largest mines in the world just under our feet. There's an entrance in the building just north-east of my house.
textByHash.14221062cf260f333270ecf913adc6434d271a76: Go away. People from the outside shut us in like animals. I have nothing to say to you.
textByHash.158d4d06b871727f5d611b16fb8bb0aed0b58c8c: Do I know you? I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.1d16669d5c6f285c19bf4fdee0ff6b73b745976c: I thought I had found a solid lead on its whereabouts when I heard of a dwarf who is an expert on gold who goes by the name of 'Boot'.
textByHash.1e9d98b5feec7402dc74d70a62166e0e9e3c991f: We don't have good days here anymore. Curse King Tyras.
textByHash.2168bea289804deb1d79e371642c15f96db57990: It's a good place to find gold...
textByHash.22983ec7d4ca8d221cd8e436c0637cdd5cd5e625: What are you doing in my house?
textByHash.2a104d2962c37fb35d23a587546d788cbc37e2b6: I'm Councillor Liam Orson, of the Kourend Council. But please, you have to understand...
textByHash.2ac0a4e7ee1ec714d06b4f13cdf4697a1b84dbb4: Goblins wandering around Lumbridge and talking to the duke like they're normal people? I don't know what the world's coming to.
textByHash.2d59138b7d0c09dcfa81b98774a8873bc73b1fe6: No, I have nothing I wish to get rid of. If you want to do some trading, there are plenty of shops and market stalls around though.
textByHash.30ade685f0680d93b15e02809238cfc595ebcc50: I'm a little worried - I've heard there's lots of people going about, killing citizens at random.
textByHash.31927f0f67ad73da971720a7f351bfd5cddb3475: She said she would return after the second fork.
textByHash.358cf0efeb1ff54a4934668fa7d45334f32b7a0c: What rudeness! This is why they say goblins have no manners!
textByHash.3718ce961173986aa10ac78c1ad6b6630a70fe82: I'll leave this place one day. You'll see.
textByHash.391c1a4e56ad034fa6e686e934859e0615217304: Oh, they may say they're civilised, but they're still goblins. You can't trust them. The only reason they're not a threat is that they're so stupid.
textByHash.39e771efb354a38ec4fecfaecf4e7f87b2471617: It's all very well the duke signing a peace treaty with those creatures. Maybe that'll stop them attacking us.
textByHash.3c09c557181930394fbaaf43de3a1b36719c9d0b: An outsider! Can you get me out of this hell hole?
textByHash.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
textByHash.449b7b7f4ea20c84b1f976a87dea7be24e41b35f: I'm sorry I can't help you there.
textByHash.4ca7e80478486aba4c5344d5629f255d8a825fa2: I don't trust that fish monger.
textByHash.4fc95774d67e568cee2a370c85a426d4c47b6194: I don't know, what will be next? Cave goblins LIVING up here? Taking our jobs? I wouldn't want my daughter to marry a goblin!
textByHash.503f1beb4ef50edb7401346afbedb77a2b336ea3: His army curses our city with this plague then wanders off again, leaving us to clear up the pieces.
textByHash.517ea57d91557a9a900497760e27a2c43db20ac1: A cave goblin? Well, there goes the neighbourhood!
textByHash.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHash.59cbcb0147819055abb6ef9f175ca2bc09f6482d: not just any old gold will be suitable. I seek only the purest, the most high quality of gold - what I seek, if you will, is perfect gold.
textByHash.59e11e2d05f12d578674e647dd43457961507c19: That's very kind of you, but no thanks.
textByHash.5bd3d7730efe8090b141e799381b8c1b91e0f977: I've seen that one before. It's yours now.
textByHash.5d5dc30ec6359b3d292abe8247f030646b281bba: Not just yet. The swamp has flooded the roads again, it's unsafe to pass.
textByHash.62df14e690f7d342591cb373d872670dac1afb4d: in finding it I am afraid. If you can find me my perfect gold, make a ring and necklace from it, and add rubies to them, I will
textByHash.644c342a52d93de964147a2d65621daf44b16702: I think we need a new king. The one we've got isn't very good.
textByHash.674c603c4b4b3e55ea931df16e816c19f5a5cddc: Snakes! Snakes! Ohhhh, there are snakes!
textByHash.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHash.74d11d51381b81ab219703b99d5812693c9a2268: Good day, madam. What brings you to this end of town?
textByHash.765ab1c0a8628f1e3b93921aec4853721d23c6f9: gladly hand over my fragment of the family crest to you.
textByHash.7a0c4d16f9c8a10cb50e70efc650bf954334b2d4: Lighting fires in an enclosed space is probably not a good idea. Oh well.
textByHash.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHash.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHash.837622fa1cb751672bf1c952a574c7e868226144: Then you have found him. My name is Avan Fitzharmon.
textByHash.864f7d54c4745053943209d8220790cbeac0b1a1: My... my father wishes this? Then that is a different matter. I will let you have my crest shard, adventurer, but you must first do something for me.
textByHash.87283a190c7c3707574fd7d9872af34fd28e0475: Good day, sir. What brings you to this end of town?
textByHash.87e8366359fe6a93afdb5701d80be7fbabaef23a: It just makes me uncomfortable, is all. What if I was in bed and some horrible little goblin poked its head up through the floor?
textByHash.891c06480bff9efe06556dd8ab92dd10e8f49c6b: I guess it's not all bad down here. At least we have a pub.
textByHash.899dd65a2c26c163f360333055b1fe8fe453f237: You're looking for Rose, aren't you?
textByHash.8c2ae6e26b97c2074eaaf65cbac7ce81de119c4a: Keep away from me you dirty goblin!
textByHash.8d0e633ebef5792295cfbc11a8488b73fbbe92ee: Can't you just leave me alone.
textByHash.8dfa01803753114edf0969ec6ef433c6c9fceaff: Not too bad, but I'm a little worried about the increase of goblins these days.
textByHash.906f38314f10653264898446e1d24c72598702ad: ... no, two of you... you can't count... ... maybe you drunk too much...
textByHash.94c98150318fb84d09fe14adf1bd21db1575d365: But... why are you exploring in my house?
textByHash.957fb7f2d39162647fcb0665c76758c2bb8c0994: This place is private! You're not welcome here!
textByHash.98c022bdee43cce209b876cc225b2108f42d9f1a: Are you asking for a fight?
textByHash.a2079a5c0ae0bca7e006d1e6da475f5d91367a98: Oh! Well, that's all right then.
textByHash.a2f94f958407e72cbe1db9feb9244d378cce1264: What? Can't you see I'm busy?
textByHash.a9b95cd5739d6b365d1f0c45aed460be0e7d2dba: No, I don't want to buy anything!
textByHash.b333b6c071257b8f81fc8008a3b64964e8beb643: Good day. What brings you to this end of town?
textByHash.b54afd13e0735581d2344788bc9c810d2578e231: But for them to come wandering around the surface and mixing with decent people? I don't know, what's the world coming to?
textByHash.b9c4280e06606266420d90eb9861a21a1369686e: None of the gold around here is even remotely suitable in terms of quality. I have searched far and wide for the perfect gold I desire, but have had no success so
textByHash.ba0ae159cd73cfcd1e1f83a5038ccaf2555bc771: What are you doing in my head?
textByHash.bd5a9ed09507e46a9875dcdf65fb813a99051946: I want the adventure to end.
textByHash.c70cf655026551362b102047ac76dc797f4b5a9c: You can't eat jelly with a fork. Are you mad?
textByHash.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHash.cb7945cde09e7f567790c8d5d4512df200d7b3e1: Too many monkeys - I can't stand it!
textByHash.cbf595b4699c7e5ec87222eb0cd972b4fc50b21f: Why don't I have a 'Teleport Home to Lumbridge' button like everyone else?
textByHash.d4c3b115572646e23d3cc8aa54331030b261c55d: You cave goblins... don't you, you know, eat people?
textByHash.d613a5fc928ef7e7186139ab905047ce55c52647: ... see... two of you... why there two of you?
textByHash.db034356c04eab91d4cb2206334229d28d66bf7f: If you'd rather enjoy yourself, there's the party room just north of here! Or you might like to climb up onto the city wall - you can get a good view of Falador from there.
textByHash.deac9369f0c4774feeb074f803864a8ab0c28ef3: I've heard there are many fearsome creatures that dwell under the ground...
textByHash.e6d0ce5f6e87fefd07fc66e4a00a06b6e9490845: Get out of my way, I'm in a hurry!
textByHash.eb155364a53af6462c2512d2cea159687a95be2e: is a golden ring, embedded with the finest precious red stone available, and a necklace to match this ring. The problem however for me, is that
textByHash.ecffff1851bc4df78312f922ed2203d1c46f211e: Ha! I suppose one of my worthless brothers has sent you on this quest then?
textByHash.edb83d7d1c45beea9072bce59b461805b13a0912: Unfortunately he has apparently returned to his home, somewhere in the mountains, and I have no idea how to find him.
textByHash.f032c4a33e8e6ac7324138b977ab0ba75feb1d5d: Can't you see I'm on the toilet?
textByHash.f42ae655c39c30e300148920aa4da7db1a0e4ed2: I should have stayed in Port Sarim.
textByHash.f9e851a1e3a4a10a412dec9813881f0e1b96d2cf: No I don't have any spare change.
textByHash.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHash.fba207ba728a12680fd246ec6c1f551105905ec0: Oh, I've got nothing against goblins in their own place. I just don't think they ought to be wandering around in our city and making the place look bad.
